title: Damage waiver as job-only option, signed estimate flows to shareable invoice

requirements.summary: Remove verbose Stripe explanation text and instructional copy from JobDetailPage payment section, retaining only the button and badge
acceptanceCriteria: No instructional text, inline notes, or explanatory copy appears near the Stripe button on the Job Detail page.
The 'Charge via Stripe' button remains visible and functional.
The 'Paid' / 'Unpaid' badge remains visible and reflects stripePaymentId presence.

file_operations.description: Remove all explanatory prose, instructional text, and UI notes from the Stripe payment section while preserving the 'Charge via Stripe' button and the 'Paid'/'Unpaid' payment status badge functionality.

requirements.summary: Move damage waiver to job-level toggle on JobDetailPage with editable text, pass enabled waiver to InvoicePreviewPage for display before signature
acceptanceCriteria: The damage waiver does not appear on any page other than JobDetailPage.tsx as a job-level option and on InvoicePreviewPage.tsx when the waiver is enabled for that job.
JobDetailPage.tsx has a damage waiver toggle/checkbox that is off by default.
When the waiver is toggled on, the editable waiver text field is revealed with the default text pre-populated.
The waiver enabled state and text are persisted on the job record (via updateJob or a dedicated backend field).
When navigating to the Invoice/Estimate preview from a job with waiver enabled, the waiver text appears prominently before the signature pad.

file_operations.description: Add a 'Damage Waiver' toggle/checkbox in the job form that is off by default. When toggled on, reveal an editable text area pre-populated with the default waiver text: 'I acknowledge that pre-existing damage, cosmetic issues, or conditions not caused by the repair technician are not the responsibility of Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC. By signing below, I agree to these terms.' Store the waiver enabled state and custom text in the job's damageWaiver field using updateDamageWaiver backend method. Verify the backend interface usage instructions before implementing.

Query the damage waiver from the job record using getDamageWaiver backend method. If the waiver is enabled for the current job, display the waiver text prominently in a dedicated section positioned before the signature pad area. Verify the backend interface usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Enable signed invoice sharing via PDF download, HTML file export, email mailto link, and SMS deep link from InvoicePreviewPage
acceptanceCriteria: After the customer saves their signature on the invoice preview, the signature image renders inline in the 'Customer Signature' section.
A 'Download PDF' button exports the full invoice (including the inline signature image) as a PDF via html2canvas + jsPDF.
A 'Download HTML' button generates a self-contained .html file of the invoice with the signature embedded as a base64 data URL and triggers a file download.

A 'Share via Email' button opens a mailto: link with subject 'Your Estimate from Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC' and a pre-filled plain-text body containing client name, job date, post-tax total, and a message that the signed estimate is attached.

A 'Share via SMS' button opens an sms: link with the pre-populated message: 'Your estimate from Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC is ready. Total: $[amount]. Please reply to confirm.' where [amount] is the post-tax total.
All four share buttons are clearly labeled and visible on the Invoice/Estimate preview page.
The PDF and HTML exports both include the saved signature image.

file_operations.description: After the customer saves their signature via the existing useStoreUserSignature hook, render the saved signature image inline in the 'Customer Signature' section using the signature data URL. Add four clearly labeled share action buttons: (1) 'Download PDF' — use html2canvas to capture the full invoice container including the rendered signature image, then convert to PDF with jsPDF and trigger download; (2) 'Download HTML' — generate a self-contained HTML string of the invoice with all styles inlined and the signature embedded as a base64 data URL image, then trigger a Blob-based file download as invoice.html; (3) 'Share via Email' — construct and navigate to a mailto: link with subject 'Your Estimate from Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC' and body text containing client name, job date, post-tax total, and a note that the signed estimate is attached; (4) 'Share via SMS' — construct and navigate to an sms: link with the message 'Your estimate from Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC is ready. Total: $[amount]. Please reply to confirm.' where [amount] is the formatted post-tax total. Ensure all four buttons are only enabled after the signature has been saved. Install html2canvas and jspdf packages if not already present.
